turns.user_message: My chest has felt tight all day for no real reason. It's just this constant low hum of tension.
That tightness keeps coming back even when I try to relax, and my heart starts racing out of nowhere. I'm constantly on edge waiting for it to happen again.
I can't shake this feeling that my own body is betraying me, and it's getting exhausting. I'm starting to think I might need to talk to someone about it.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens by describing a physical feeling.
